channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Adopted and Locked Away: Kids promised ‘forever homes’ instead confined in for-profit institutions
item.description: An Associated Press investigation finds that a business known for tough-love boarding schools for rebellious, rich teenagers has set its sights on a different demographic: adopted kids.

item.title: Man charged with attempted assassination of Trump in White House correspondents’ dinner shooting
Court hearing for man charged with killing 2 University of South Florida students
